basics.name: location
basics.label: Region
basics.toolTip: Azure region for the demo environment.

basics.name: baseName
basics.label: Base name
basics.toolTip: Short prefix used for deployed resource names.

basics.name: nameSuffix
basics.label: Name suffix (retry only)
basics.toolTip: Leave empty on first deploy. If redeploying after a partial failure, enter a short value such as 2 or 3 to avoid name conflicts with resources stuck in deletion.

options.text: Before deploying, run infra/scripts/setup-fabric-provision-identity.ps1 in a PowerShell 7 terminal to create the UAMI, assign it a role on your Fabric workspace, and print the resourceId value required below. The client ID is auto-derived by the deployment.

elements.name: fabricWorkspaceName
elements.label: Fabric workspace name
elements.toolTip: Required. Name of an existing capacity-backed Fabric workspace.

constraints.validationMessage: Workspace name must be 1-256 characters (letters, digits, spaces, underscore or dash).

elements.name: fabricLakehouseName
elements.label: Fabric lakehouse name
elements.toolTip: Lakehouse to create or use inside the workspace. Leave the default unless you already have a lakehouse with the same name.

elements.name: fabricUamiResourceId
elements.label: UAMI resource ID
elements.toolTip: Paste the managedIdentityResourceId printed by setup-fabric-provision-identity.ps1 (full Azure resource ID of the UAMI).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be the full Azure resource ID of a Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities resource.
